sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (start_date TIMESTAMPTZ, end_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT datediff('hour', start_date, end_date) AS hours_difference FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 18:00:00' WHERE start_date = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:00:00';
SELECT datediff('minute', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:30:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:45:00') AS minutes_difference;
